CustomField.description: Verified Org-Wide Email Address to send outbound document emails (invoices, contracts, etc.) FROM, instead of the running user. Must exactly match the address of a verified Org-Wide Email Address (Setup → Org-Wide Addresses). When blank or unmatched, documents send from the running user.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter a verified Org-Wide Email Address (Setup → Org-Wide Addresses) to send documents from. Leave blank to send as the running user.
CustomField.label: Document From (Org-Wide Email)
